title: Amethyst Gear
description: A mod that adds amethyst armor and tools that are stronger than iron but weaker than diamond
body:
Have you ever thought that amethyst didnt have a purpose? This mod adds new amethyst armor and tools to give amethyst more features. 
The mod adds:
1. Amethyst armor: 
-Amethyst Helmet with 3 armor and 1.5 Armor Thoughness
-Amethyst Chestplate with 7 armor and 1.5 Armor Thoughness
-Amethyst Leggings with 6 armor and 1.5 Armor Thoughness
-Amethyst Boots with 2 Armor and 1.5 Armor Thoughness
   
2. Amethyst Tools:
-Amethyst Sword with 7 Attack Damage and 1.6 Attack Speed
-Amethyst Pickaxe with 7 Efficiency (for refernce iron has 6 and diamond has 8)
-Amethyst Axe with 7 Efficiency, 9 attack damage and 0.9 attack speed
-Amethyst Shovel with 7 efficiency, 5 attack damage and 1 attack speed
-Amethyst Hoe with 7 effieciency, 1 attack damage and 6 attack speed
   
3. Crafting recipes:
-You can craft the armor and tools just like iron or diamond armor, you just have to replace the iron ingots/diamonds with amethyst shard
   
4. Advancements:
-The mod adds the advancement called "crystal warrior" which you achieve by having all 
amethyst armor pieces in your inventory at the same time to the "minecraft" tab
